+/*
+ * @test
+ * @key randomness
+ * @bug 8380669
+ * @summary Tests parsing of MemStat directive
+ * @modules java.base/jdk.internal.misc
+ * @library /test/lib /
+ *
+ * @build jdk.test.whitebox.WhiteBox
+ * @run driver jdk.test.lib.helpers.ClassFileInstaller jdk.test.whitebox.WhiteBox
+ * @run main ${test.main.class}
+ */
+
+package compiler.compilercontrol.directives;
+
+import compiler.compilercontrol.share.SingleCommand;
+import compiler.compilercontrol.share.scenario.Command;
+import compiler.compilercontrol.share.scenario.Scenario;
+
+public class MemStatTest {
+    public static void main(String[] args) {
+        new SingleCommand(Command.MEMSTAT, Scenario.Type.DIRECTIVE).test();
+    }
+}
